name: AI Lead Engine - Production Hardened v3.0

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger

options.responseData: {"status": "accepted", "message": "Lead generation started. Results will appear in Airtable & Sheets shortly.", "code": 202}

nodes.notes:
FIXED: responseMode changed from lastNode ? onReceived.
Returns 202 Accepted immediately so the caller is never left hanging.
Entry point — POST /webhook/leadyx-generate
Expected body: { city, business_type, client_id, plan }

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: IMPROVED: Added client_id format validation (alphanumeric/underscore, 4-64 chars) to ensure DB schema compatibility.

nodes.name: Generate Keywords (OpenAI)

parameters.prompt: Generate exactly 10 unique Google search queries to find {{$json["business_type"]}} businesses in {{$json["city"]}}. Return ONLY a JSON array of strings. Example: ["dentist clinic Delhi contact", ...]. No explanation.

nodes.notes:
FIXED: Switched from gpt-4 → gpt-4o-mini (~90% cost reduction, same quality for structured keyword tasks).
IMPROVED: Lowered temperature to 0.4 for more deterministic JSON output.

nodes.name: Parse Keywords
nodes.notes: Parses OpenAI keyword array and fans out one item per keyword.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: IMPROVED: batchSize increased from 3 → 5 to reduce total pipeline time while staying within rate limits.

nodes.name: Apify Google Search
nodes.notes:
SECURITY FIX: Token removed from URL query param (was logged in plain text).
Now uses n8n 'Header Auth' credential — set up in n8n > Credentials > Header Auth:
  Name: Authorization
  Value: Bearer YOUR_APIFY_TOKEN
Bind that credential to this node's 'genericAuthType' field.

nodes.name: Extract URLs
nodes.notes: IMPROVED: Extended URL blacklist to include Facebook, Instagram, Yelp, JustDial, LinkedIn, IndiaMART, Zomato, Practo and other non-lead aggregator domains.

nodes.name: Filter Valid URLs
nodes.notes: Removes null or skipped entries before scraping.

nodes.name: Scrape Website (ScrapingBee)
nodes.notes:
FIXED: Replaced basic HTTP GET with ScrapingBee API.
SECURITY FIX: Use an n8n 'Query Auth' credential instead of passing the API key as a plain-text query param.
SETUP: n8n > Credentials > Query Auth, then set Name: api_key and Value: YOUR_SCRAPINGBEE_API_KEY.
Handles JS-rendered sites (React/Next.js), Cloudflare/Bot protection, and proxy rotation.
Alternatives: Browserless.io or a dedicated Apify Web Scraper actor.
Continues on failure to avoid blocking the whole pipeline.

nodes.name: Extract Contacts
nodes.notes:
IMPROVED: Phone regex now international (IN/US/UK/EU/generic), filters numbers < 7 digits.
Raw HTML snippet (first 5000 chars) passed to AI node to detect obfuscated emails like 'info [at] company [dot] com'.

nodes.name: Filter Leads With Contacts
nodes.notes: Only passes through leads that have at least one email or phone.

nodes.name: OpenAI Clean & Enrich
nodes.notes:
FIXED: Switched gpt-4 → gpt-4o-mini (~90% cost saving).
IMPROVED: Prompt now explicitly instructs AI to find obfuscated emails (e.g. 'info [at] company [dot] com') from the raw HTML snippet.
IMPROVED: primary_phone requested in E.164 format directly from AI.

nodes.name: Lead Scoring
nodes.notes: IMPROVED: Added company_name GATEKEEPER — leads with null/empty company_name are immediately scored 0 + tagged 'discard_reason: company_name_null' to prevent junk Warm leads polluting Airtable.

nodes.name: Filter Hot & Warm Leads
nodes.notes: Routes leads: true = Hot/Warm (score ≥ 40) → Dedup Check → Airtable, false = Cold leads → Log.

nodes.name: Deduplication Check (Airtable)
nodes.notes:
NEW (Deduplication): Searches Airtable for existing records matching the same email OR website.
Always Output Data is enabled so the workflow still emits one paired item when Airtable finds 0 matches.
Empty Airtable result = new lead; 1+ records returned = duplicate → skip saving.

nodes.name: Is New Lead?
nodes.notes:
NEW (Deduplication Gate): true (empty Airtable payload after Always Output Data) = unique lead → proceed to Save.
false (1+ Airtable records returned) = duplicate → silently dropped.
Avoids deprecated $items() usage and preserves the original paired lead item for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: Save to Airtable
nodes.notes:
Saves de-duplicated Hot/Warm leads to Airtable Leads table.
Field mappings are sourced from the paired Lead Scoring item so dedup results do not overwrite lead data.

nodes.name: Backup to Google Sheets
nodes.notes:
Backup all qualified leads to Google Sheets.
Field mappings are sourced from the paired Lead Scoring item so dedup results do not overwrite lead data.

nodes.name: Send to CRM API
nodes.notes:
Pushes leads to backend API (app.leadyx.io).
Payload is sourced from the paired Lead Scoring item so the CRM receives the original lead, not the Airtable create response.

nodes.name: Send Outreach Email

parameters.subject: Quick Question for {{$('Lead Scoring').item.json["company_name"]}}
parameters.message:
Hi there,

I came across {{$('Lead Scoring').item.json["company_name"]}} and wanted to reach out about a potential opportunity.

We help {{$('Lead Scoring').item.json["industry"]}} businesses in {{$('Lead Scoring').item.json["city"]}} grow their client base using AI-powered lead generation.

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute call this week?

Best regards,
Team

nodes.notes:
⚠️ DANGER: Sending high-volume cold email via personal Gmail WILL trigger spam flags and get the workspace banned.
RECOMMENDED: Replace this node with SendGrid, Mailchimp Transactional, or Amazon SES for production volume.
For low-volume testing only, Gmail is acceptable.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp (Twilio)

parameters.name: To
parameters.value: whatsapp:={{  (function(raw) {    if (!raw) return '';    const digits = raw.replace(/\D/g, '');    if (digits.startsWith('91') && digits.length === 12) return '+' + digits;    if (digits.startsWith('1') && digits.length === 11) return '+' + digits;    if (digits.length === 10) return '+91' + digits;    return '+' + digits;  })($('Lead Scoring').item.json['primary_phone'])}}

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: Hi! We found your business {{$('Lead Scoring').item.json["company_name"]}} and wanted to connect. We help {{$('Lead Scoring').item.json["industry"]}} businesses grow. Interested in a quick chat? Reply YES.

nodes.notes:
IMPROVED: Phone number is now normalised to E.164 format before sending to Twilio.
Logic: strips non-digits, infers country code (+91 for 10-digit IN numbers, +1 for 11-digit US numbers).
For international expansion, update the AI prompt in node_12 to return E.164 directly.

nodes.name: Slack Notification
nodes.notes: Sends Slack alert for every new Hot or Warm lead.

nodes.name: Log Cold Leads
nodes.notes: Archives cold leads and gatekeeper-rejected leads to a separate sheet for future re-engagement.

nodes.name: Log Error to Slack
nodes.notes: Catches all errors and posts details to Slack #leadyx-errors.

nodes.name: Respond 202 Accepted

parameters.responseBody: {"success": true, "message": "Lead pipeline completed", "note": "Check Airtable and Google Sheets for results"}

nodes.notes:
⚠️ NOTE: With responseMode: onReceived on node_1, the HTTP 202 response is sent immediately at the start.
This node is now DISCONNECTED from the flow (no incoming connections).
It is kept here as a reference only. You can safely delete it.

nodes.name: Merge Before Slack
nodes.notes: Merges CRM API and Email paths before single Slack notification.

settings._errorWorkflow_note: Set this to your n8n Error Workflow ID in Settings > Error Workflow after import

meta.description: Full AI Lead Generation Webhook Workflow — Production Hardened v3.0. Trigger via POST /webhook/leadyx-generate with { city, business_type, client_id, plan }.
changelog_v3: node_1: responseMode lastNode → onReceived (202 Accepted, no more timeouts)
node_3: gpt-4 → gpt-4o-mini (~90% cost saving) + temperature lowered to 0.4 for more deterministic JSON
node_6: Hardcoded Apify token moved to n8n Header Auth credential
node_7: URL blacklist extended (Facebook, Instagram, Yelp, JustDial, etc.)
node_9: Basic HTTP GET → ScrapingBee API (JS rendering + proxy rotation) + API key moved to n8n Query Auth credential
node_12: gpt-4 → gpt-4o-mini + prompt updated to detect obfuscated emails
node_19: Phone number normalised to E.164 before Twilio call
node_26/27 (NEW): Deduplication check via Airtable before saving + Always Output Data + empty-result gate for new leads
node_24: Disconnected (superseded by onReceived response on node_1)
credentials_required: apifyApiKey (now via n8n Header Auth credential — Authorization: Bearer TOKEN)
scrapingBeeApiKey (now via n8n Query Auth credential — api_key=YOUR_SCRAPINGBEE_API_KEY)
gmailOAuth2 (consider replacing with SendGrid/SES for production)
